name: hypericin
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: photodynamic and redox-active signaling; no established human antidepressant mechanism at isolated-compound level.
contraindications: No isolated-compound clinical interaction set is established beyond herb-level St Johns wort interaction liability.
summary: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: photodynamic and redox-active signaling; no established human antidepressant mechanism at isolated-compound level.
